About Us

Who We Are

We are a professional furniture and interior design company specializing in high-quality custom furniture and modern interior solutions. Our goal is simple — to turn your ideas into beautifully crafted spaces that combine elegance, comfort, and functionality.

With years of experience in design, production, and installation, we deliver durable, stylish, and perfectly finished projects for homes, offices, and commercial spaces across Accra and Ghana.

"We don't just build furniture — we create environments that inspire."

Custom DesignsTailored precisely to your space and vision
Premium MaterialsFinest quality materials and finishes only
Expert InstallersPrecision installation by skilled craftsmen
On-Time DeliveryWe always honor every timeline we commit to
What We Do

Our Services

From concept to completion — every piece crafted with precision and passion.

01 / 07

Luxury Kitchen

Premium custom kitchen layouts with overhead & base cabinets, island units, soft-close hinges, premium finishing, and full countertop integration.

Get a Quote
02 / 07

Wardrobes

Sliding, hinged, and mirror wardrobes with internal drawers, shelving, shoe racks, and modern finishes — maximizing bedroom storage beautifully.

Get a Quote
03 / 07

Walk-In Closets

Luxury walk-in closets with open shelving, hanging sections, LED lighting, custom shoe displays, and island storage for an elevated dressing experience.

Get a Quote
04 / 07

Classic Kitchen design

Floating kitchen units and feature wall cabinet with large space management.

Get a Quote
05 / 07

luxury washroom

From minimalist to luxury upholstered frames — strong, stylish cabinet frames with custom woods perfectly matched to your kitchen theme.

Get a Quote
06 / 07

Luxury Furniture

Executive desks, reception counters, workstations, conference tables, and storage cabinets — professional environments that reflect your brand.

Get a Quote
07 / 07

Curtains & Blinds

Blackout curtains, sheer curtains, roller blinds, Venetian blinds, and motorized blinds — measurement, supply, and professional installation included.

Get a Quote

Why Choose Us

The T & J Difference

01
Custom Designs Tailored to Your Space

Every project starts with your vision — designed around your exact space, lifestyle, and taste.

02
High-Quality Materials & Finishing

Only premium materials with superior durability and finishes that look stunning for years.

03
Professional Installation Team

Skilled craftsmen bring your design to life with meticulous attention to every joint and panel.

04
Affordable & Transparent Pricing

No hidden costs — a clear itemized quote from day one, fair pricing for exceptional quality.

05
On-Time Project Delivery

We value your time. Every deadline we commit to, we honor — always on schedule.

06
Customer Satisfaction Guaranteed

We don't consider a project complete until you are fully delighted with every detail.

500+Happy Clients
How We Work

Our Process

A seamless 6-step journey from your first idea to a perfectly finished space.

1

Consultation

We discuss your needs, ideas, and vision to understand exactly what you want.

2

Measurement

We visit your space and take precise measurements for a perfect custom fit.

3

Design

We create custom design plans tailored to your style preferences and budget.

4

Production

Our craftsmen fabricate your furniture with precision using premium materials.

5

Installation

Our professional team installs everything with care and expert craftsmanship.

6

Final Inspection

We conduct a thorough quality check to ensure perfection before handover.

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from real clients who trusted T&J Kitchens to transform their spaces.

"T&J Kitchens exceeded every expectation I had. My kitchen is absolutely stunning — the cabinets are perfectly fitted and the finishing is flawless. I get compliments from every visitor. Worth every pesewa!"

Abena MensahEast Legon, AccraKitchen Cabinets

"They designed a full walk-in closet and I can't believe how beautiful it turned out. The LED lighting, the wood panels, the organization — it feels like a luxury boutique right in my own home!"

Kwame AsanteTrasacco, AccraWalk-In Closet

"Professional from start to finish. My TV wall unit is now the centerpiece of my living room. Very happy with the workmanship and attention to detail — delivered right on time."

Ama Owusu-BoatengAdjiringanor, AccraTV Unit

"My wardrobe was custom-built to fit an awkward corner and they nailed it perfectly. The sliding doors are smooth, the interior layout is exactly what I described, and the quality is top-notch!"

Eric DarkoTema, Greater AccraCustom Wardrobe

"The curtains and blinds completely transformed our rooms. The blackout curtains work perfectly and the installation was clean and tidy. Very professional team — we will definitely use them again!"

Akosua FrimpongSpintex, AccraCurtains & Blinds

"T&J did our entire apartment — kitchen, wardrobes, TV unit, and curtains. Everything matched perfectly and was completed within the agreed timeframe. Transparent pricing and second-to-none quality in Accra."

Samuel & Grace BoatengAirport Hills, AccraFull Home Package
